properties.Observation: In the area with embankments along the left bank of the Mahaweli River
properties.Description:
Planting Kumbuk and Bambo Trees

Vegetative cover improving along the river bank bank with Areca nut seedling in 1.5m x 1.5m grid, Kumbuk/ Mee/ Godapara/ Kaduru/ Aththikka/ Wal Del/ Kekuna/ randomly mixed seedlings and planting at 3.5m x 3.5 m grid inter

properties.Observation: During the rainy season, a very high volume of water flows along this canal, causing erosion of the stream banks.

properties.Observation: Since it is an area along the left bank of the Mahaweli River, there are threats of flooding and soil erosion of banks.
